themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "The specific instruction that the seven lamps give light toward the front of the lampstand in...". Cross references echo "Light".

evidenceTrail.detail: The specific instruction that the seven lamps give light toward the front of the lampstand in...

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 2 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: הַנֵּרֽוֹת׃: lamps - a lamp (i.e., the burner) or light (literally or figuratively)

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 4 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: עָשָׂ֖ה: so he made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application

themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "God commands Moses to separate the Levites from among the children of Israel and cleanse them...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶל: - near, with or among; often in general, to".
